privileged_info_summary: The task is to dynamically create a new synthetic shift schedule. It is verified that the expected shift ID is 'WKDAY9TO5', the name is 'Weekday Daytime 9-5', the start time is '0900', and the length is '8.00'. The shift should only be active on Monday through Friday (5 days), and must exclude weekends (forbidden days '0' and '6'). All parameters correspond directly to explicit instructions in the task description and are strictly validated in the scoring logic.
